ext.description: Private TS authoring, public JS + d.ts delivery, with lint-first validation and runtime-aware emit strategies.
cmd.reconstruct: Forge TypeLayer: Reconstruct source from JS + d.ts
cfg.title: Forge TypeLayer
cfg.showNotifications: Show notifications when emitting or failing.
cfg.useWorkspaceTypescript: Use workspace TypeScript if available; otherwise use extension TypeScript.

cfg.entriesFile: Workspace manifest file that defines public entrypoints and outputs.
